summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the opening away from a clock-stamped morning entry so it differentiates cleanly from chapter 3's office opening, and replaced a verbatim style-bible calibration line in the Roy exchange.
edits: Rewrote the first paragraph to start from Doug checking the viral count in the bathroom before work instead of a timestamped morning setup.
Changed Doug's reply to Roy from 'Morning. You okay?' to 'Hey. You okay?' to remove a verbatim calibration-only example line.
